articles.title: Mexico’s World Cup run ends with loss to England at Estadio Azteca - NPR
articles.description: Playing at altitude with the passionate backing of 80,824 fans at Estadio Azteca, and with a man advantage for most of the second half, Mexico scored twice but could never equalize and lost 3-2.

articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump intervened on behalf of American star forward Folarin Balogun, whose suspension was lifted in a decision that allows him to play in a World Cup match against Belgium on Monday. Balogun, the American leader with three goals, receive…

articles.title: Erling Haaland cements superstar status, scores twice in Norway’s 2-1 win over Brazil - NBC News
articles.description: Haaland delivered both goals as Norway defeated five-time champion Brazil and advanced to the World Cup quarterfinals for the first time in its history.

articles.title: Eury Pérez pulled after seven perfect innings - NBC Sports
articles.description: Eury Pérez threw seven perfect innings to pick up a win in a 9-8 victory for the Marlins over the Athletics on Sunday.

articles.title: Neymar quits international football after Brazil’s World Cup knockout loss - Al Jazeera
articles.description: The injury-plagued striker converted a penalty but failed to take his team into the last 16 of the FIFA World Cup.

articles.description: Vinícius Júnior had the ball at the penalty spot, a perfect chance to give Brazil the lead. And he handed it to Bruno Guimarães. And by the time Neymar took and made Brazil’s second penalty kick, it was too late for the five-time World Cup champions. Guimarãe…

articles.title: Naomi Osaka beats Aryna Sabalenka to reach Wimbledon quarters - ESPN
articles.description: In a matchup of two of the hardest hitters on tour, Naomi Osaka outslugged top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka 6-2, 7-6 (2) to reach the Wimbledon quarterfinals for the first time.

articles.description: Novak Djokovic is headed to his ninth straight Wimbledon quarterfinal after beating Roman Safiullin in four sets, 7-6(6), 6-3, 3-6, 6-3 on Sunday.
